title: Commercial Membrane Manufacturing Scale-Up
entry_mechanism: Scale-up of DT-1 Phase I pilot to full commercial production volumes with Saudi Water Company long-term offtake
executive_summary: Node DT-6 is the commercial scale-up of DT-1's membrane manufacturing pilot. Phase I (DT-1) establishes the JV, qualification, and pilot production line. DT-6 targets full commercial scale: expanding from pilot production of 50,000 membrane elements per year to 500,000+ elements per year — sufficient to serve Saudi Arabia's annual membrane replacement demand and begin regional exports. The scale-up requires additional casting lines, drying equipment, and performance testing infrastructure, anchored by SWCC's long-term membrane supply agreement.
